content:
Member-only story

2 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Photo by charlesdeluvio on UnsplashThe discussion was not limited to theoretical concepts; it focused heavily on understanding the “why” behind Java internals and concurrent programming.
🔹 Core Java
* ExecutorService internals
* ThreadPoolExecutor lifecycle
* Core Pool Size vs Maximum Pool Size
* BlockingQueue implementations
* LinkedBlockingQueue
* ArrayBlockingQueue
* SynchronousQueue
* PriorityBlockingQueue
* Rejection policies in ThreadPoolExecutor
* CompletableFuture and ForkJoinPool
🔹 Concurrency
* Task scheduling and execution flow
* Thread pool saturation scenarios
* Queue behavior under high load
* Real-world performance considerations
🔹 Java Immutability
* Why String is immutable
* Benefits of immutability:
* Thread safety
* Security
* String Pool optimization
* How to design immutable classes
* Importance of:
* private fields
* final fields
*…
